mapper.select: select r.id, r.member_id as member_id, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, r.report_id as report_id, r.restriction_type as restriction_type, r.reason, r.status, r.previous_member_status as previous_member_status, r.start_datetime as start_datetime, r.end_datetime as end_datetime, r.released_datetime as released_datetime, r.created_datetime as created_datetime from tbl_member_restriction r join tbl_member m on r.member_id = m.id where r.id = #{id}

select r.id, r.member_id as member_id, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, r.report_id as report_id, r.restriction_type as restriction_type, r.reason, r.status, r.previous_member_status as previous_member_status, r.start_datetime as start_datetime, r.end_datetime as end_datetime, r.released_datetime as released_datetime, r.created_datetime as created_datetime from tbl_member_restriction r join tbl_member m on r.member_id = m.id where r.member_id = #{memberId} and r.status = 'ACTIVE' order by r.created_datetime desc limit 1

select r.id, r.member_id as member_id, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, r.report_id as report_id, r.restriction_type as restriction_type, r.reason, r.status, r.previous_member_status as previous_member_status, r.start_datetime as start_datetime, r.end_datetime as end_datetime, r.released_datetime as released_datetime, r.created_datetime as created_datetime from tbl_member_restriction r join tbl_member m on r.member_id = m.id where r.status = 'ACTIVE' and r.restriction_type = 'LIMIT' and r.end_datetime is not null and r.end_datetime <= now() order by r.created_datetime desc
mapper.insert: insert into tbl_member_restriction ( member_id, report_id, restriction_type, reason, previous_member_status, end_datetime ) values ( #{memberId}, #{reportId}, #{restrictionType}, #{reason}, #{previousMemberStatus}, #{endDatetime} )
mapper.update: update tbl_member_restriction set report_id = #{request.reportId}, reason = #{request.reason}, end_datetime = #{request.endDatetime}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id} and status = 'ACTIVE'
update tbl_member_restriction set status = 'RELEASED', released_datetime = now(), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id} and status = 'ACTIVE'
update tbl_member_restriction set status = 'EXPIRED', updated_datetime = now() where status = 'ACTIVE' and restriction_type = 'LIMIT' and end_datetime is not null and end_datetime <= now()
